ABOUT.TITLE: About me
ABOUT.TEXT: Hey there, I'm Angelo. I build modern frontend experiences and always focus on clean architecture, performance, and great usability.

POINTS.LOCATION: Based near Aachen and open to remote collaboration.
POINTS.LEARNING: Open-minded and continuously improving my skills with new technologies.
POINTS.PROBLEM_SOLVING: Analytical problem-solving with creativity, persistence, and collaboration.

SKILLS.TITLE: Skill Set
SKILLS.TEXT: A short introduction of your skills. Highlight your experience of using different front-end technologies and emphasize your openness to learning and adapting to new technologies.
SKILLS.SUBTEXT: Feel free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge.

PROJECTS.TITLE: Featured Projects
PROJECTS.INTRO: Explore a selection of my work here - Interact with projects to see my skills in action.

MOONBERRY.DESCRIPTION: You can choose between three characters, make your way through a level, defeat various enemies, and fight your way to the final boss.

POKEDEX.DESCRIPTION: A complete Pokemon database where users can browse, search, and explore detailed information about all Pokemon.

JOIN.DESCRIPTION: A Kanban-style task management app. This project is currently in progress.

CONTACT.TITLE: Let's work together
CONTACT.SUBTITLE: Got a problem to solve?
CONTACT.LEAD: I help turn ideas into reliable, user-friendly web experiences. If you need a frontend developer who writes clean code and focuses on real product value, let's connect.

SECTION_2.TITLE: Responsible for content according to Section 18 para. 2 MStV

SECTION_3.TITLE: Additional Notes
SECTION_3.PARAGRAPH_1: This legal notice applies to Angelo Niessen's website.
SECTION_3.PARAGRAPH_2: If legally required, please add further mandatory information here: commercial register, association register, partnership register or cooperative register, registration number, VAT ID according to Section 27a UStG, or business ID according to Section 139c AO.

SECTION_1.TITLE: 1. Controller
SECTION_1.PARAGRAPH_1: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:

SECTION_2.TITLE: 2. Processing when visiting this website (server log files)
SECTION_2.PARAGRAPH_1: When you access this website, technically necessary data may be processed in server log files (e.g. IP address, date/time, requested page, browser/OS, referrer).
SECTION_2.PARAGRAPH_2: The purpose is the technical provision, stability and security of this website. The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest).

SECTION_3.TITLE: 3. Contact form and e-mail communication
SECTION_3.PARAGRAPH_1: If you contact me via the contact form or by e-mail, I process the data you submit (e.g. name, e-mail address, message) to respond to your request.
SECTION_3.PARAGRAPH_2: The legal basis is Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (pre-contractual communication) and additionally Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest in handling inquiries).

SECTION_4.TITLE: 4. Recipients of data
SECTION_4.PARAGRAPH_1: Personal data is only transferred to third parties where legally permitted or required. Technical service providers may receive access where necessary (especially hosting and e-mail providers).
SECTION_4.PARAGRAPH_2: Please add your specific providers here: [insert hosting provider], [insert e-mail provider].

SECTION_5.TITLE: 5. Storage period
SECTION_5.PARAGRAPH_1: I store personal data only as long as necessary for the respective purposes or as long as statutory retention obligations apply.

SECTION_6.TITLE: 6. Obligation to provide data
SECTION_6.PARAGRAPH_1: Providing your data in the contact form is neither legally nor contractually required. However, without this information I cannot process your request.

SECTION_7.TITLE: 7. Your rights
SECTION_7.PARAGRAPH_1: Under the GDPR, you have the right to access, rectification, erasure, restriction of processing, data portability and to object to processing.
SECTION_7.PARAGRAPH_2: You also have the right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.

SECTION_8.TITLE: 8. Competent supervisory authority
SECTION_8.AUTHORITY: State Commissioner for Data Protection and Freedom of Information North Rhine-Westphalia (LDI NRW)

SECTION_9.TITLE: 9. No automated decision-making
SECTION_9.PARAGRAPH_1: No automated decision-making, including profiling within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR, takes place.

SECTION_10.TITLE: 10. Contact for privacy requests
SECTION_10.PREFIX: If you have questions regarding data protection, please contact:
